word: H6004 - עָמַם - ʻâmam - aw-mam' - Become dim

sections.paragraph:
Original: עמם

Transliteration: ‛âmam

Phonetic: aw-mam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to dim, darken, grow dark
    1. (Qal) to dim, eclipse, be held dark
    2. (Hophal) to be dimmed, grow dark

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1641

Part(s) of speech: Verb
